allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('dates:', len\(d.get\('dates',[]\)\), '| signal:', d.get\('signal'\), '| backtest signals:', len\(d.get\('backtest_signals',[]\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) pi = d.get\('prediction_intervals', {}\) print\('Prediction models:', list\(pi.keys\(\)\)\) if pi: m = list\(pi.keys\(\)\)[0] print\('Sample forecast dates:', pi[m]['dates'][:3]\) print\('Best model:', d.get\('best_model'\)\) ")
